Footer.tagline: Camping in the heart of Mors
Footer.copyright: © {year} Camping Slap Af. All rights reserved.

Home.heroSubtitle: Experience the authentic camping adventure in Sejerslev on the beautiful island of Mors
Home.highlight1Description: Located in Sejerslev with views over the stunning Limfjord landscape and close to the Moler cliffs.
Home.highlight2Description: Activities for the whole family — playground, fishing pond, hiking trails and much more right at your doorstep.
Home.highlight3Description: Relax in nature's quiet surroundings, away from the city noise. Find peace to recharge here.
Home.ctaDescription: Book your spot at Camping Slap Af and experience the best of Mors.

About.title: About Camping Slap Af
About.storyText1: Camping Slap Af is located in the charming village of Sejerslev on the island of Mors in the Limfjord. We offer an authentic and relaxed camping experience surrounded by extraordinary nature.
About.storyText2: Our campsite is the perfect base for exploring Mors' many attractions — from the impressive Moler cliffs to the cozy villages and rich wildlife.
About.locationText: Mors is the largest island in the Limfjord and offers a varied landscape with dramatic cliffs, peaceful beaches and green hills. Sejerslev is located in the northwestern part of the island, close to Hanklit and the world-famous fossils.
About.value1Description: We take care of the nature around us and encourage our guests to enjoy it with respect.
About.value2Description: We believe camping is about togetherness — with family, with friends and with new acquaintances.
About.value3Description: No unnecessary distractions. Just you, nature and a great experience.

Accommodation.title: Accommodation
Accommodation.subtitle: Find the perfect accommodation for your stay at Camping Slap Af
Accommodation.tentDescription: Spacious tent pitches with soft grass and good distance to neighbours. Electricity available.
Accommodation.caravanDescription: Caravan pitches with electrical connection and water access nearby. Level ground.
Accommodation.cabinDescription: Cozy cabins for 2-4 people with basic facilities. Perfect for those who want a bit more comfort.
Accommodation.glampingDescription: Unique glamping experience with comfortable beds, lighting and a special atmosphere in the middle of nature.
Accommodation.facilitiesDescription: All guests have access to toilet and shower rooms, kitchen, common room and barbecue area.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.comingSoonText: We are working on an online booking system so you can soon reserve your spot directly here on the site.
Booking.contactCta: In the meantime, feel free to contact us to reserve your spot.

Activities.title: Activities
Activities.subtitle: There is plenty to experience — both on site and in the surrounding area
Activities.activity1Description: Large playground with swings, climbing frame and sandpit for the little ones.
Activities.activity2Description: Try your luck at our put-and-take fishing pond. Equipment can be rented on site.
Activities.activity3Description: Gather the family around the campfire in the evening. We provide the firewood.
Activities.activity4Description: Cozy pétanque court for a relaxed match with the family.
Activities.nearby1Description: Impressive Moler cliffs with fossils from 55 million years ago. Just a few kilometres away.
Activities.nearby2Description: Northern Europe's largest flower and activity park with tropical zoo and water park.
Activities.nearby3Description: Explore Mors' unique geology and the famous moler fossils.
Activities.nearby4Description: Mors has a network of beautiful cycling routes along the coast and through the landscape.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
Contact.formComingSoon: Contact form coming soon. Please use email or phone.
